source: CLR-v1 updated with Stream 00.2 recovered from docs/architecture/_recovered_00x/canonical-layer-model.md
a2b_update: Stream 00.2 (canonical-layer-model.md) found in docs/architecture/_recovered_00x/. L0-L8 now fully defined. MCA-001 resolved. Verdict upgraded.
reassessment_question: With Stream 00.2 recovered, is the L1-L6 model CONFIRMED, MODIFIED, or REJECTED?
rationale: The document defines all 9 layers (L0-L8) with complete definitions: purpose, ownership, allowed inputs/outputs, must-never constraints, placement rules.
L1 = Evidence Normalization Layer. L2 = Evidence Navigation Layer (ENL). Both previously undefined.
L3 = Derivation Layer (maps to 40.5 Signal Computation — consistent with A.1 HIGH-confidence fragments).
L4 = Semantic Shaping Layer (maps to 41.x — consistent with A.1 HIGH-confidence fragments).
L5 = Presentation Assembly Layer (maps to 43.x-44.x binding+projection zone — consistent with A.1 MEDIUM-inferred).
L6 = Runtime Experience Layer (maps to 42.x ExecLens — consistent with A.1 MEDIUM-inferred).
All L1-L6 definitions match observed runtime stream behavior from A.1 crawl.
Governance status is PROVISIONAL (not LOCK-READY) due to open drift items (SSZ/SSI at L6, L4 spec absent), but these are implementation deviations, not definitional gaps.
PROVISIONAL does not mean MODIFIED — the model is defined and its definitions are confirmed.

L1.definition: Evidence Normalization Layer — converts heterogeneous evidence into controlled machine-usable structural form without changing truth claims
L1.notes: Previously NOT DEFINED. Now explicitly defined by Stream 00.2.

L2.notes: No canonical corpus node defines L2. Stream 00.2 would define it.

L3.best_anchor: CC-019 (44.1 Section 2: 'signals produced at L3, shaped at L4')
L3.notes: L3 = Signal Derivation. Fragment is explicit and appears in two canonical corpus nodes independently.

L4.best_anchor: CC-016 (43.1 Section 10: semantic shaping layer reference)
L4.secondary_anchor: CC-013 (41.1 semantic elevation confirms L4 functional zone)
L4.notes: L4 = Semantic Shaping. Explicit fragment in 43.1; functional zone confirmed by 41.x canonical corpus nodes.

L5.definition: Presentation Assembly Layer — assembles evidence-bound semantic and derived outputs into presentation-ready payloads
L5.notes: Previously MEDIUM inferred. Now explicitly defined by Stream 00.2. L5 = Presentation Assembly confirms 43.x-44.x functional zone mapping.

L6.definition: Runtime Experience Layer — renders and interacts with assembled outputs
L6.notes: Previously MEDIUM inferred. Now explicitly defined by Stream 00.2. L6 explicitly names ExecLens as runtime consumer layer.

L7.definition: Demo / Narrative Packaging Layer — packages system for demonstrations, investor sequencing, curated walkthroughs
L7.notes: L7 is beyond the L1-L6 scope but now fully defined. 51.x explicitly classified as L7 in the canonical model.

L8.definition: Governance, Contract, and Validation Layer — constrains, validates, documents, and audits the system
L8.notes: L8 is beyond the L1-L6 scope but now fully defined. Cross-cutting layer.

nine_stage_pipeline.notes: Stages 1-7 fully confirmed in canonical corpus. Stages 8-9 (N-012, N-013) excluded as MEDIUM confidence (PARTIAL lifecycle).

three_layer_analytical_model.notes: All three layers (Observability, Intelligence, Executive Intelligence) fully represented in canonical corpus.

l_number_model_complete.confidence: HIGH for definitions; PROVISIONAL for implementation compliance
l_number_model_complete.notes: L0-L8 all explicitly defined by Stream 00.2. L1-L6 definitions confirmed. Governance status PROVISIONAL due to open drift: SSZ/SSI at L6 (should be L3), L4 formal spec absent. Definitions are confirmed; implementation has known deviations under remediation.

delta_from_a2.confidence_change: L1-L2: NONE→HIGH. L3-L4: HIGH (unchanged, now also definitionally confirmed). L5-L6: MEDIUM inferred→HIGH definitionally confirmed. L7-L8: NONE→HIGH (out of L1-L6 scope but now defined).
delta_from_a2.new_findings: Stream 00.2 found. L0-L8 complete. Governance lock in effect. 6 drift items identified (4 open). 8 audit findings classified (F1-F8). Remediation streams 40.16-40.17 in evidence.

final_reassessment_verdict: CONFIRMED (PROVISIONAL governance status) — Stream 00.2 found at docs/architecture/_recovered_00x/canonical-layer-model.md. L0-L8 are fully defined. All L1-L6 layers are explicitly defined and their definitions are consistent with observed runtime stream behavior from A.1 crawl. Governance status is PROVISIONAL because SSZ/SSI derivation is currently mis-layered at L6 (should be L3) and L4 semantic shaping formal specification is absent. These are known implementation deviations under remediation — they do not change the definitional verdict. The 9-Stage Pipeline and Three-Layer Analytical Model remain CONFIRMED at HIGH confidence and are structurally independent of the L-number model.
